# Code of Conduct

## Our Pledge

We as contributors and maintainers pledge to make participation
in our community a harassment-free experience for everyone.

## Our Standards

✅ **Be respectful** — Different viewpoints are welcome  
✅ **Be constructive** — Focus on what's best for the project  
✅ **Be collaborative** — Help others learn and grow

❌ **No harassment** — Personal attacks, trolling, or spamming  
❌ **No spam** — Unsolicited promotions or off-topic content

## Enforcement

Instances of abusive behavior may be reported to the project maintainer.
All complaints will be reviewed and investigated promptly.

## Attribution

This Code of Conduct is adapted from the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org).
